prompt: The bar is a unit of pressure defined as 1.00 × 10^6 dynes/cm^2, or 1.00 × 10^5 N/m^2. What is the equivalent of the bar in units of mm Hg?
Eng_Single_Step: The pressure in mm Hg is obtained by converting from Pascals using standard conversion factors.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: 1 bar = 10⁵ Pa. Step 2: Convert Pa to mm Hg. Step 3: Use known relation. Step 4: Compute. Final Answer: ≈ 750 mm Hg.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A pressão em mm Hg é obtida convertendo-se de Pascal usando fatores de conversão padrão.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: 1 barra = 10⁵ Pa. Etapa 2: Converta Pa em mm Hg. Etapa 3: use relação conhecida. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: ≈ 750 mm Hg.
Spanish_Single_Step: La presión en mm Hg se obtiene convirtiendo a Pascales utilizando factores de conversión estándar.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: 1 bar = 10⁵ Pa. Paso 2: Convertir Pa a mm Hg. Paso 3: utilice una relación conocida. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: ≈ 750 mm Hg.
Italian_Single_Step: La pressione in mm Hg si ottiene convertendo da Pascal utilizzando fattori di conversione standard.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: 1 bar = 10⁵ Pa. Passaggio 2: convertire Pa in mm Hg. Passaggio 3: utilizzare la relazione nota. Passaggio 4: calcolo. Risposta finale: ≈ 750 mm Hg.
German_Single_Step: Der Druck in mm Hg wird durch Umrechnung von Pascal unter Verwendung von Standard-Umrechnungsfaktoren ermittelt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: 1 bar = 10⁵ Pa. Schritt 2: Pa in mm Hg umrechnen. Schritt 3: Bekannte Beziehung verwenden. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: ≈ 750 mm Hg.
French_Single_Step: La pression en mm Hg est obtenue par conversion à partir de Pascals à l'aide de facteurs de conversion standards.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : 1 bar = 10⁵ Pa. Étape 2 : Convertir Pa en mm Hg. Étape 3 : Utilisez la relation connue. Étape 4 : Calculer. Réponse finale : ≈ 750 mm Hg.

prompt: Calculate the future value of an ordinary annuity of $800 per year for 4 years at 5% rate of return.
Eng_Single_Step: The future value is calculated using annuity formula FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify PMT, r, n. Step 2: Substitute values. Step 3: Compute factor. Step 4: Multiply. Final Answer: Future value.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O valor futuro é calculado usando a fórmula de anuidade FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique PMT, r, n. Etapa 2: valores substitutos. Etapa 3: calcular o fator. Etapa 4: Multiplique. Resposta Final: Valor futuro.
Spanish_Single_Step: El valor futuro se calcula utilizando la fórmula de anualidad FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar PMT, r, n. Paso 2: sustituir valores. Paso 3: Calcular el factor. Paso 4: multiplicar. Respuesta final: valor futuro.
Italian_Single_Step: Il valore futuro viene calcolato utilizzando la formula di rendita FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare PMT, r, n. Passaggio 2: valori sostitutivi. Passaggio 3: calcolo del fattore. Passaggio 4: moltiplicare. Risposta finale: valore futuro.
German_Single_Step: Der zukünftige Wert wird mithilfe der Rentenformel FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r berechnet.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie PMT, r, n. Schritt 2: Werte ersetzen. Schritt 3: Faktor berechnen. Schritt 4: Multiplizieren. Endgültige Antwort: Zukünftiger Wert.
French_Single_Step: La valeur future est calculée à l'aide de la formule de rente FV = PMT[(1+r)^n−1]/r.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez PMT, r, n. Étape 2 : Remplacez les valeurs. Étape 3 : Calculer le facteur. Étape 4 : Multipliez. Réponse finale : valeur future.

prompt: A 2-liter Dumas bulb contains n moles of nitrogen at 0.5atm pressure and at T°K. On addition of 0.01 moles of oxygen, it is necessary to cool the bulb to a temperature of 10°C in order to maintain the same pressure. Calculate n and T.
Eng_Single_Step: The values of n and T are obtained using ideal gas law before and after adding oxygen.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Apply PV=nRT. Step 2: Initial condition. Step 3: Final condition. Step 4: Solve equations. Final Answer: n and T.
Portuguese_Single_Step: Os valores de n e T são obtidos usando a lei dos gases ideais antes e depois da adição de oxigênio.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Aplicar PV=nRT. Etapa 2: Condição inicial. Etapa 3: Condição final. Etapa 4: Resolva equações. Resposta final: n e T.
Spanish_Single_Step: Los valores de n y T se obtienen utilizando la ley de los gases ideales antes y después de agregar oxígeno.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Aplicar PV=nRT. Paso 2: condición inicial. Paso 3: Condición final. Paso 4: resuelve ecuaciones. Respuesta final: n y T.
Italian_Single_Step: I valori di n e T si ottengono utilizzando la legge dei gas ideali prima e dopo l'aggiunta di ossigeno.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: applicare PV=nRT. Passaggio 2: condizione iniziale. Passaggio 3: condizione finale. Passaggio 4: risolvere le equazioni. Risposta finale: n e T.
German_Single_Step: Die Werte von n und T werden unter Verwendung des idealen Gasgesetzes vor und nach der Zugabe von Sauerstoff ermittelt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: PV=nRT anwenden. Schritt 2: Ausgangszustand. Schritt 3: Endgültiger Zustand. Schritt 4: Gleichungen lösen. Endgültige Antwort: n und T.
French_Single_Step: Les valeurs de n et T sont obtenues en utilisant la loi des gaz parfaits avant et après l'ajout d'oxygène.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Appliquer PV=nRT. Étape 2 : État initial. Étape 3 : État final. Étape 4 : Résolvez les équations. Réponse finale : n et T.

prompt: All of the following support the endosymbiotic theory that ancestors of mitochondria and chloroplasts were once independent, free-living prokaryotes EXCEPT:
Eng_Single_Step: The correct answer excludes structures not having their own DNA or double membranes.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify evidence. Step 2: Mitochondria/chloroplast traits. Step 3: Compare options. Step 4: Select exception. Final Answer: Non-supporting structure.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A resposta correta exclui estruturas que não possuem DNA próprio ou membranas duplas.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique as evidências. Etapa 2: Traços de mitocôndrias/cloroplastos. Etapa 3: compare as opções. Etapa 4: selecione a exceção. Resposta Final: Estrutura não sustentada.
Spanish_Single_Step: La respuesta correcta excluye las estructuras que no tienen ADN propio ni doble membrana.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la evidencia. Paso 2: Rasgos de mitocondrias/cloroplastos. Paso 3: compara opciones. Paso 4: seleccione la excepción. Respuesta final: estructura sin soporte.
Italian_Single_Step: La risposta corretta esclude strutture prive di DNA proprio o doppie membrane.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare le prove. Passaggio 2: tratti mitocondri/cloroplasti. Passaggio 3: confronta le opzioni. Passaggio 4: seleziona l'eccezione. Risposta finale: struttura non portante.
German_Single_Step: Die richtige Antwort schließt Strukturen aus, die keine eigene DNA oder Doppelmembranen haben.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Beweise identifizieren. Schritt 2: Mitochondrien-/Chloroplastenmerkmale. Schritt 3: Optionen vergleichen. Schritt 4: Ausnahme auswählen. Endgültige Antwort: Nicht tragende Struktur.
French_Single_Step: La bonne réponse exclut les structures ne possédant pas leur propre ADN ni leur double membrane.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifier les preuves. Étape 2 : Caractéristiques mitochondries/chloroplastes. Étape 3 : Comparez les options. Étape 4 : Sélectionnez une exception. Réponse finale : Structure non porteuse.

prompt: High levels of progesterone are essential for the maintenance of the uterine lining during pregnancy. But high levels of progesterone exerts a negative feedback action on LH secretion, with a consequent decrease in LH secretion and eventual atrophy of the corpus luteum. Atrophy of the corpus luteum cuts the progesterone supply resulting in menstruation. Clearly, these events cannot take place after conception, or the embryo would get sloughed off. When conception occurs, the corpus luteum is seen to last through most of pregnancy. How can this be explained?
Eng_Single_Step: The embryo is maintained because hCG preserves the corpus luteum and progesterone production.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify hormone. Step 2: hCG secretion. Step 3: Maintains corpus luteum. Step 4: Prevents menstruation. Final Answer: hCG action.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O embrião é mantido porque o hCG preserva o corpo lúteo e a produção de progesterona.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o hormônio. Etapa 2: secreção de hCG. Etapa 3: mantém o corpo lúteo. Passo 4: Previne a menstruação. Resposta Final: ação do hCG.
Spanish_Single_Step: El embrión se mantiene porque la hCG preserva el cuerpo lúteo y la producción de progesterona.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar la hormona. Paso 2: secreción de hCG. Paso 3: Mantiene el cuerpo lúteo. Paso 4: Previene la menstruación. Respuesta final: acción de hCG.
Italian_Single_Step: L'embrione viene mantenuto perché l'hCG preserva il corpo luteo e la produzione di progesterone.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'ormone. Passaggio 2: secrezione di hCG. Passaggio 3: preserva il corpo luteo. Passaggio 4: previene le mestruazioni. Risposta finale: azione hCG.
German_Single_Step: Der Embryo bleibt erhalten, da hCG den Gelbkörper und die Progesteronproduktion erhält.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Hormon identifizieren. Schritt 2: hCG-Sekretion. Schritt 3: Pflegt den Gelbkörper. Schritt 4: Verhindert die Menstruation. Endgültige Antwort: hCG-Wirkung.
French_Single_Step: L'embryon est maintenu car l'hCG préserve la production de corps jaune et de progestérone.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez l’hormone. Étape 2 : sécrétion d'hCG. Étape 3 : Maintient le corps jaune. Étape 4 : Empêche les menstruations. Réponse finale : action hCG.

prompt: Using a marginal utility approach, explain why air, so vitally important to the maintenance of life, is free.
Eng_Single_Step: Air is free because its marginal utility is low relative to its abundance.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify total vs marginal utility. Step 2: Abundance reduces marginal value. Step 3: Price reflects marginal utility. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Low marginal utility.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O ar é gratuito porque a sua utilidade marginal é baixa em relação à sua abundância.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a utilidade total versus a utilidade marginal. Passo 2: A abundância reduz o valor marginal. Etapa 3: O preço reflete a utilidade marginal. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Baixa utilidade marginal.
Spanish_Single_Step: El aire es gratuito porque su utilidad marginal es baja en relación con su abundancia.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la utilidad total frente a la marginal. Paso 2: La abundancia reduce el valor marginal. Paso 3: El precio refleja la utilidad marginal. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: utilidad marginal baja.
Italian_Single_Step: L’aria è gratuita perché la sua utilità marginale è bassa rispetto alla sua abbondanza.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'utilità totale e marginale. Passo 2: L’abbondanza riduce il valore marginale. Passo 3: Il prezzo riflette l’utilità marginale. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: utilità marginale bassa.
German_Single_Step: Luft ist kostenlos, weil ihr Grenznutzen im Verhältnis zu ihrem Vorkommen gering ist.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie den Gesamtnutzen gegenüber dem Grenznutzen. Schritt 2: Fülle reduziert den Grenzwert. Schritt 3: Der Preis spiegelt den Grenznutzen wider. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Niedriger Grenznutzen.
French_Single_Step: L’air est gratuit parce que son utilité marginale est faible par rapport à son abondance.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifier l'utilité totale par rapport à l'utilité marginale. Étape 2 : L’abondance réduit la valeur marginale. Étape 3 : Le prix reflète l’utilité marginale. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Faible utilité marginale.

prompt: (a) 10 annual mortgage payments of $1,000, (b) 12 monthly payments of $100 on his automobile, (c) a bill for $2,000 due in two years, (d) a bill for $1,000 due today. Using an annual interest rate of 12 percent (nominal rate on the automobile loan and effective rate on all other debts), determine the annual amount necessary to retire the entire debt in 15 years.
Eng_Single_Step: The annual payment is determined by discounting all liabilities to present value and converting to annuity.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute PV of obligations. Step 2: Sum values. Step 3: Convert to annuity. Step 4: Solve payment. Final Answer: Annual payment.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O pagamento anual é determinado através do desconto de todas as obrigações a valor presente e conversão para anuidade.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Calcular o VP das obrigações. Etapa 2: Somar os valores. Etapa 3: converter em anuidade. Etapa 4: Resolva o pagamento. Resposta Final: Pagamento anual.
Spanish_Single_Step: El pago anual se determina descontando todos los pasivos al valor presente y convirtiéndolos en anualidades.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcular el PV de las obligaciones. Paso 2: Sumar valores. Paso 3: convertir a anualidad. Paso 4: Resuelve el pago. Respuesta final: Pago anual.
Italian_Single_Step: Il pagamento annuale è determinato attualizzando tutte le passività al valore attuale e convertendole in rendita.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare il PV delle obbligazioni. Passaggio 2: somma dei valori. Passaggio 3: conversione in rendita. Passaggio 4: risolvere il pagamento. Risposta finale: pagamento annuale.
German_Single_Step: Die jährliche Zahlung wird durch Abzinsung aller Verbindlichkeiten auf den Barwert und Umrechnung in eine Annuität ermittelt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Berechnen Sie den PV der Verpflichtungen. Schritt 2: Werte summieren. Schritt 3: Umrechnung in Rente. Schritt 4: Zahlung abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Jährliche Zahlung.
French_Single_Step: Le paiement annuel est déterminé en actualisant tous les passifs à leur valeur actuelle et en les convertissant en rente.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Calculez la valeur actuelle des obligations. Étape 2 : additionnez les valeurs. Étape 3 : Convertir en rente. Étape 4 : Résolvez le paiement. Réponse finale : Paiement annuel.

prompt: The relation between the selling price of a car (in $1,000) and its age (in years) is estimated from a random sample of cars of a specific model. The relation is given by the following formula: Selling price = 15.9 – 0.983 (age) Which of the following can we conclude from this equation?
Eng_Single_Step: The equation shows that price decreases by about 0.983 thousand dollars per year of age.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify slope. Step 2: Negative coefficient. Step 3: Interpret units. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Depreciation rate.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A equação mostra que o preço diminui cerca de 0,983 mil dólares por ano de idade.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a inclinação. Etapa 2: Coeficiente negativo. Etapa 3: interpretar unidades. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Taxa de depreciação.
Spanish_Single_Step: La ecuación muestra que el precio disminuye alrededor de 0,983 mil dólares por año de edad.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar la pendiente. Paso 2: Coeficiente negativo. Paso 3: interpretar las unidades. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: tasa de depreciación.
Italian_Single_Step: L'equazione mostra che il prezzo diminuisce di circa 0,983 mila dollari all'anno.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la pendenza. Passaggio 2: coefficiente negativo. Passaggio 3: interpretare le unità. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: tasso di ammortamento.
German_Single_Step: Die Gleichung zeigt, dass der Preis pro Lebensjahr um etwa 0,983 Tausend Dollar sinkt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Gefälle ermitteln. Schritt 2: Negativer Koeffizient. Schritt 3: Einheiten interpretieren. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Abschreibungssatz.
French_Single_Step: L'équation montre que le prix diminue d'environ 0,983 mille dollars par année d'âge.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez la pente. Étape 2 : Coefficient négatif. Étape 3 : Interpréter les unités. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : taux de dépréciation.

prompt: A uniformly charged conducting sphere of $1.2 \mathrm{~m}$ diameter has surface charge density $8.1 \mu \mathrm{C} / \mathrm{m}^2$. Find the net charge on the sphere.
Eng_Single_Step: The net charge is found using surface area times surface charge density.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute sphere area. Step 2: Multiply by σ. Step 3: Calculate. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Net charge.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A carga líquida é encontrada usando a área superficial vezes a densidade de carga superficial.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: calcular a área da esfera. Etapa 2: Multiplique por σ. Etapa 3: calcular. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: cobrança líquida.
Spanish_Single_Step: La carga neta se encuentra usando el área superficial multiplicada por la densidad de carga superficial.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcular el área de la esfera. Paso 2: Multiplica por σ. Paso 3: Calcular. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: cargo neto.
Italian_Single_Step: La carica netta si trova utilizzando l'area superficiale per la densità di carica superficiale.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare l'area della sfera. Passaggio 2: moltiplicare per σ. Passaggio 3: calcolare. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: addebito netto.
German_Single_Step: Die Nettoladung wird aus der Oberfläche multipliziert mit der Oberflächenladungsdichte ermittelt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Berechnen Sie die Kugelfläche. Schritt 2: Mit σ multiplizieren. Schritt 3: Berechnen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Nettogebühr.
French_Single_Step: La charge nette est trouvée en utilisant la surface multipliée par la densité de charge de surface.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Calculer la surface de la sphère. Étape 2 : Multipliez par σ. Étape 3 : Calculez. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Frais nets.

prompt: Samantha has 342 baseball cards. Perry has 184 baseball cards. How many more baseball cards does Samantha have than Perry?
Eng_Single_Step: The difference is found by subtracting 184 from 342.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify values. Step 2: Subtract. Step 3: Compute. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: 158.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A diferença é encontrada subtraindo 184 de 342.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique os valores. Etapa 2: subtrair. Etapa 3: calcular. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: 158.
Spanish_Single_Step: La diferencia se encuentra restando 184 de 342.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar valores. Paso 2: Restar. Paso 3: Calcular. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: 158.
Italian_Single_Step: La differenza si trova sottraendo 184 da 342.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare i valori. Passaggio 2: sottrai. Passaggio 3: calcolo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: 158.
German_Single_Step: Die Differenz wird ermittelt, indem 184 von 342 subtrahiert wird.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Werte identifizieren. Schritt 2: Subtrahieren. Schritt 3: Berechnen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: 158.
French_Single_Step: La différence est trouvée en soustrayant 184 de 342.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez les valeurs. Étape 2 : Soustraire. Étape 3 : Calculer. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : 158.

prompt: Which bodhisattva is known for conducting the souls of dead children to salvation?
Eng_Single_Step: The bodhisattva is Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify context. Step 2: Buddhist figure. Step 3: Role with children. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Jizo.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O bodhisattva é Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o contexto. Etapa 2: figura budista. Etapa 3: Papel com as crianças. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Jizo.
Spanish_Single_Step: El bodhisattva es Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar el contexto. Paso 2: figura budista. Paso 3: Rol con los niños. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Jizo.
Italian_Single_Step: Il bodhisattva è Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il contesto. Passaggio 2: figura buddista. Passo 3: Ruolo con i bambini. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: Jizo.
German_Single_Step: Der Bodhisattva ist Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie den Kontext. Schritt 2: Buddhistische Figur. Schritt 3: Rolle mit Kindern. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Jizo.
French_Single_Step: Le bodhisattva est Jizo (Ksitigarbha).
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez le contexte. Étape 2 : Figure bouddhiste. Étape 3 : Rôle auprès des enfants. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Jizo.

prompt: Which of the following statements accurately describes the relationship between average product (AP) and marginal product (MP) of labor?
Eng_Single_Step: MP intersects AP at AP’s maximum, and MP above AP raises AP.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify curves. Step 2: Compare MP and AP. Step 3: Determine intersection. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: MP=AP at max AP.
Portuguese_Single_Step: MP cruza PA no máximo de PA, e MP acima de PA aumenta PA.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique as curvas. Etapa 2: compare MP e AP. Etapa 3: determine a interseção. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: MP = AP no AP máximo.
Spanish_Single_Step: MP cruza AP en el máximo de AP, y MP por encima de AP aumenta AP.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar curvas. Paso 2: Compara MP y AP. Paso 3: Determinar la intersección. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: MP=AP en AP máximo.
Italian_Single_Step: Gli MP intersecano l’AP al massimo dell’AP, e gli MP sopra l’AP aumentano l’AP.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare le curve. Passaggio 2: confronta MP e AP. Passaggio 3: determinare l'intersezione. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: MP=AP al massimo AP.
German_Single_Step: MP schneidet AP bei AP-Maximum und MP über AP erhöht AP.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Kurven identifizieren. Schritt 2: Vergleichen Sie MP und AP. Schritt 3: Schnittpunkt bestimmen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: MP=AP bei maximalem AP.
French_Single_Step: Les MP croisent AP au maximum de AP, et les MP au-dessus de AP augmentent AP.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez les courbes. Étape 2 : Comparez MP et AP. Étape 3 : Déterminez l’intersection. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : MP = AP au maximum AP.

prompt: The Magic-Voice Radio Supply Company is taking inventory at the end of the year. One of the items on stock is their # 84A tube. Records for these tubes show the following: Quantity Cost per Tube Inventory, January 1 800 $.252 Purchase of March 3 2,000 $.247 Purchase of June 5 1,500 $.262 Purchase of October 13 900 $.27 Purchase of November 25 600 $.272 If the quantity of these tubes on hand is 1,700, what would be the value of the inventory using each of the following methods? (a) Average Cost (b) FIFO (c) LIFO
Eng_Single_Step: The inventory values differ under methods due to cost flow assumptions.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute average cost. Step 2: Apply FIFO. Step 3: Apply LIFO. Step 4: Compare. Final Answer: Inventory values.
Portuguese_Single_Step: Os valores de estoque diferem conforme os métodos devido às premissas de fluxo de custos.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: calcular o custo médio. Etapa 2: Aplicar FIFO. Etapa 3: Aplicar LIFO. Etapa 4: compare. Resposta Final: Valores de estoque.
Spanish_Single_Step: Los valores de inventario difieren según los métodos debido a supuestos de flujo de costos.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcule el costo promedio. Paso 2: aplique FIFO. Paso 3: aplique LIFO. Paso 4: comparar. Respuesta final: valores de inventario.
Italian_Single_Step: I valori delle scorte differiscono in base ai metodi a causa delle ipotesi sul flusso dei costi.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare il costo medio. Passaggio 2: applicare FIFO. Passaggio 3: applicare LIFO. Passaggio 4: confrontare. Risposta finale: valori di inventario.
German_Single_Step: Die Bestandswerte unterscheiden sich je nach Methode aufgrund von Kostenflussannahmen.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Berechnen Sie die durchschnittlichen Kosten. Schritt 2: FIFO anwenden. Schritt 3: LIFO anwenden. Schritt 4: Vergleichen. Endgültige Antwort: Inventarwerte.
French_Single_Step: Les valeurs des stocks diffèrent selon les méthodes en raison des hypothèses de flux de coûts.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : calculez le coût moyen. Étape 2 : Appliquez le FIFO. Étape 3 : Appliquez LIFO. Étape 4 : Comparez. Réponse finale : valeurs d'inventaire.

prompt: Which of the following indicates a primary context?
Eng_Single_Step: A primary context refers to original, firsthand sources from the time period.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Define primary source. Step 2: Identify examples. Step 3: Compare with secondary. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Firsthand source.
Portuguese_Single_Step: Um contexto primário refere-se a fontes originais e de primeira mão do período.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Definir a fonte primária. Etapa 2: Identifique exemplos. Etapa 3: compare com o secundário. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Fonte em primeira mão.
Spanish_Single_Step: Un contexto primario se refiere a fuentes originales y de primera mano de la época.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Definir fuente primaria. Paso 2: Identificar ejemplos. Paso 3: Comparar con secundaria. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: fuente de primera mano.
Italian_Single_Step: Un contesto primario si riferisce a fonti originali di prima mano del periodo di tempo.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: definire la fonte primaria. Passaggio 2: identificare gli esempi. Passaggio 3: confrontare con il secondario. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: fonte di prima mano.
German_Single_Step: Ein primärer Kontext bezieht sich auf Originalquellen aus erster Hand aus der Zeit.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Primärquelle definieren. Schritt 2: Beispiele identifizieren. Schritt 3: Mit Sekundär vergleichen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Quelle aus erster Hand.
French_Single_Step: Un contexte principal fait référence à des sources originales et de première main de l’époque.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Définir la source principale. Étape 2 : Identifiez des exemples. Étape 3 : Comparez avec le secondaire. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : source de première main.

prompt: What is \lim_{x 	o 9} ((x - 9)/(\sqrt{x} - 3))?
Eng_Single_Step: The limit simplifies to 6 by rationalizing the denominator.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Multiply conjugate. Step 2: Simplify expression. Step 3: Cancel terms. Step 4: Evaluate. Final Answer: 6.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O limite é simplificado para 6 racionalizando o denominador.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Multiplique o conjugado. Etapa 2: Simplifique a expressão. Etapa 3: cancelar os termos. Etapa 4: avaliar. Resposta Final: 6.
Spanish_Single_Step: El límite se simplifica a 6 racionalizando el denominador.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Multiplicar conjugado. Paso 2: simplifica la expresión. Paso 3: cancelar los términos. Paso 4: evaluar. Respuesta final: 6.
Italian_Single_Step: Il limite si semplifica a 6 razionalizzando il denominatore.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: moltiplicare il coniugato. Passaggio 2: semplificare l'espressione. Passaggio 3: annulla i termini. Passaggio 4: valutare. Risposta finale: 6.
German_Single_Step: Der Grenzwert vereinfacht sich auf 6, indem der Nenner rationalisiert wird.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Konjugat multiplizieren. Schritt 2: Ausdruck vereinfachen. Schritt 3: Bedingungen kündigen. Schritt 4: Bewerten. Endgültige Antwort: 6.
French_Single_Step: La limite se simplifie à 6 en rationalisant le dénominateur.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Multiplier le conjugué. Étape 2 : Simplifiez l’expression. Étape 3 : Annulez les conditions. Étape 4 : Évaluer. Réponse finale : 6.

prompt: A shaft distributes mechanical power of 160 hp at a speed of 400 rpm. It is subjected to sudden loading and heavy shock conditions with a maximum bending moment of 32,000 lbs-in. Assuming that the shaft has a keyway and considering the ASME code, calculate the suitable diameter for the shaft.
Eng_Single_Step: The shaft diameter is determined using torsion and bending stress equations under ASME code.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute equivalent stress. Step 2: Apply shock factors. Step 3: Use formula. Step 4: Solve diameter. Final Answer: Shaft diameter.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O diâmetro do eixo é determinado usando equações de torção e tensão de flexão sob o código ASME.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Calcule a tensão equivalente. Etapa 2: aplique fatores de choque. Etapa 3: use a fórmula. Etapa 4: Resolva o diâmetro. Resposta final: Diâmetro do eixo.
Spanish_Single_Step: El diámetro del eje se determina utilizando ecuaciones de esfuerzo de torsión y flexión bajo el código ASME.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcule la tensión equivalente. Paso 2: Aplicar factores de choque. Paso 3: use fórmula. Paso 4: Resuelve el diámetro. Respuesta final: diámetro del eje.
Italian_Single_Step: Il diametro dell'albero viene determinato utilizzando equazioni di sollecitazione di torsione e flessione secondo il codice ASME.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare lo stress equivalente. Passaggio 2: applicare i fattori di shock. Passaggio 3: utilizzare la formula. Passaggio 4: risolvere il diametro. Risposta finale: diametro dell'albero.
German_Single_Step: Der Wellendurchmesser wird mithilfe von Torsions- und Biegespannungsgleichungen gemäß ASME-Code bestimmt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Vergleichsspannung berechnen. Schritt 2: Schockfaktoren anwenden. Schritt 3: Formel verwenden. Schritt 4: Durchmesser ermitteln. Endgültige Antwort: Wellendurchmesser.
French_Single_Step: Le diamètre de l'arbre est déterminé à l'aide d'équations de contrainte de torsion et de flexion selon le code ASME.

prompt: In 1985, a widow, the undisputed owner of a cottage, leased it to a tenant for a term of seven years. Rent was to be paid in installments due on the first day of each month. One year later, in 1986, the widow died leaving no heirs. In her will, the widow left her entire estate to the Boy Scouts of America. The cottage was not specifically mentioned in the will. One month after the widow died, the tenant, having learned of her death, decided to remain on the property, but stopped paying rent. The Boy Scouts of America organization was unaware that the widow made a gift to the organization until 2009, when attorneys for the organization conducted an inventory of testamentary gifts to the Boy Scouts of America, which revealed that they had a claim to ownership of the cottage. The statutory period for adverse possession in this jurisdiction is 20 years. The tenant's statutory period for adverse possession began to run when
Eng_Single_Step: The statutory period begins when possession becomes adverse, i.e., when tenant stops paying rent.

prompt: Two men held-up a liquor store in a city. During the robbery, one of the participants shot and killed the owner of the store. The next day, the prosecuting attorney made a decision to delay indictment until he could discover the identity of the defendant's accomplice. The defendant was then released from police custody. In this jurisdiction the statute of limitations for murder is five years. Five months later, the prosecuting attorney, after unsuccessfully attempting to secure information on the defendant's cohort, indicted the defendant, charging him with felony murder. Shortly before trial, the only eyewitness to the crime died. He would have testified that the defendant did not participate in the robbery. The defendant's motion to dismiss the indictment because of the delay between the date of the crime and the date of the indictment will most probably be

prompt:
This question refers to the following information.
"When we were kids the United States was the wealthiest and strongest country in the world; the only one with the atom bomb, the least scarred by modern war, an initiator of the United Nations that we thought would distribute Western influence throughout the world. Freedom and equality for each individual, government of, by, and for the people—these American values we found good, principles by which we could live as men. Many of us began maturing in complacency.
"As we grew, however, our comfort was penetrated by events too troubling to dismiss. First, the permeating and victimizing fact of human degradation, symbolized by the Southern struggle against racial bigotry, compelled most of us from silence to activism. Second, the enclosing fact of the Cold War, symbolized by the presence of the Bomb, brought awareness that we ourselves, and our friends, and millions of abstract 'others' we knew more directly because of our common peril, might die at any time. . . ."

prompt: A lunar module usedAerozine50 as fuel and nitrogen tetroxide (N_2 O_4, molecular weight = 92.0 g/mole) as oxidizer.Aerozine50 consists of 50 % by weight of hydrazine (N_2 H_4, molecular weight = 32.0 g/mole) and 50 % by weight of unsymmetricaldimethylhydrazine ((CH_3)_2 N_2 H_2, molecular weight = 60.0 g/mole). prompt:
This question refers to the following information.
"Our constitution does not copy the laws of neighboring states; we are rather a pattern to others than imitators ourselves. Its administration favors the many instead of the few; this is why it is called a democracy. If we look to the laws, they afford equal justice to all in their private differences; if no social standing, advancement in public life falls to reputation for capacity, class considerations not being allowed to interfere with merit; nor again does poverty bar the way, if a man is able to serve the state, he is not hindered by the obscurity of his condition. The freedom which we enjoy in our government extends also to our ordinary life. There, far from exercising a jealous surveillance over each other, we do not feel called upon to be angry with our neighbor for doing what he likes, or even to indulge in those injurious looks which cannot fail to be offensive, although they inflict no positive penalty. But all this ease in our private relations does not make us lawless as citizens. Against this fear is our chief safeguard, teaching us to obey the magistrates and the laws, particularly such as regard the protection of the injured, whether they are actually on the statute book, or belong to that code which, although unwritten, yet cannot be broken without acknowledged disgrace."
Thucydides, History of the Peloponnesian War, ca. 415 B.C.E.
During the time period in which this text was written, who was allowed to participate in the Greek democratic process?
Eng_Single_Step: Participation in Greek democracy was limited to free adult male citizens.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify Athens context. Step 2: Exclude women, slaves, foreigners. Step 3: Only male citizens vote. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Free male citizens.

Portuguese_Multi_Step: Passo 1: Identificar o contexto de Atenas. Passo 2: Excluir mulheres, escravos, estrangeiros. Passo 3: Apenas os cidadãos do sexo masculino votam. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Cidadãos do sexo masculino livres.
