prompt: An increase in the demand for money in the economy could result from
Eng_Single_Step: Increased demand for money can result from higher income or price levels.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify determinants. Step 2: Transactions demand. Step 3: Precautionary demand. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Higher income/price.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O aumento da procura por moeda pode resultar de níveis de rendimento ou de preços mais elevados.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique os determinantes. Etapa 2: Demanda de transações. Passo 3: Exigência de precaução. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Maior renda/preço.
Spanish_Single_Step: Una mayor demanda de dinero puede deberse a mayores niveles de ingresos o de precios.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar los determinantes. Paso 2: Demanda de transacciones. Paso 3: Demanda cautelar. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Mayor ingreso/precio.
Italian_Single_Step: L’aumento della domanda di moneta può derivare da livelli di reddito o di prezzi più elevati.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare i determinanti. Passaggio 2: domanda di transazioni. Fase 3: domanda precauzionale. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: reddito/prezzo più elevato.
German_Single_Step: Eine erhöhte Geldnachfrage kann aus einem höheren Einkommen oder Preisniveau resultieren.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Determinanten identifizieren. Schritt 2: Transaktionsnachfrage. Schritt 3: Vorsorgliche Nachfrage. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Höheres Einkommen/Preis.
French_Single_Step: Une demande accrue de monnaie peut résulter d’une hausse des revenus ou des niveaux de prix.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifier les déterminants. Étape 2 : Demande de transactions. Étape 3 : Demande conservatoire. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Revenu/prix plus élevés.

prompt: What is a tracheostomy?
Eng_Single_Step: A tracheostomy is a surgical opening in the trachea to assist breathing.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify procedure. Step 2: Create airway. Step 3: Insert tube. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Surgical airway.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A traqueostomia é uma abertura cirúrgica na traqueia para auxiliar a respiração.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o procedimento. Etapa 2: criar vias aéreas. Etapa 3: insira o tubo. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Via aérea cirúrgica.
Spanish_Single_Step: Una traqueotomía es una abertura quirúrgica en la tráquea para ayudar a respirar.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el procedimiento. Paso 2: crear vía aérea. Paso 3: inserte el tubo. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: vía aérea quirúrgica.
Italian_Single_Step: Una tracheostomia è un'apertura chirurgica nella trachea per assistere la respirazione.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la procedura. Passaggio 2: creare le vie aeree. Passaggio 3: inserire il tubo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: vie aeree chirurgiche.
German_Single_Step: Eine Tracheotomie ist eine chirurgische Öffnung in der Luftröhre, um die Atmung zu erleichtern.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Vorgehensweise festlegen. Schritt 2: Atemwege erstellen. Schritt 3: Rohr einführen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Chirurgische Atemwege.
French_Single_Step: Une trachéotomie est une ouverture chirurgicale dans la trachée pour faciliter la respiration.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifier la procédure. Étape 2 : Créez les voies respiratoires. Étape 3 : Insérez le tube. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Voies respiratoires chirurgicales.

prompt: Kirkwood gaps are observed in the main asteroid belt including at the position(s) where:
Eng_Single_Step: Kirkwood gaps occur at orbital resonances with Jupiter.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify asteroid belt. Step 2: Gravitational resonance. Step 3: Orbital clearing. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Resonance positions.
Portuguese_Single_Step: As lacunas de Kirkwood ocorrem em ressonâncias orbitais com Júpiter.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o cinturão de asteróides. Etapa 2: Ressonância gravitacional. Etapa 3: Limpeza orbital. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Posições de ressonância.
Spanish_Single_Step: Las brechas de Kirkwood ocurren en resonancias orbitales con Júpiter.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el cinturón de asteroides. Paso 2: Resonancia gravitacional. Paso 3: limpieza orbital. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: posiciones de resonancia.
Italian_Single_Step: Le lacune di Kirkwood si verificano nelle risonanze orbitali con Giove.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la cintura degli asteroidi. Passaggio 2: risonanza gravitazionale. Passaggio 3: compensazione orbitale. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: posizioni di risonanza.
German_Single_Step: Kirkwood-Lücken treten bei Orbitalresonanzen mit Jupiter auf.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie den Asteroidengürtel. Schritt 2: Gravitationsresonanz. Schritt 3: Orbitale Reinigung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Resonanzpositionen.
French_Single_Step: Des lacunes de Kirkwood se produisent lors des résonances orbitales avec Jupiter.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez la ceinture d’astéroïdes. Étape 2 : Résonance gravitationnelle. Étape 3 : Dégagement orbital. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : positions de résonance.

prompt:
This question refers to the following information.
"The power . . . given to the commanding officer over all the people of each district is that of an absolute monarch. His mere will is to take the place of all law. . . . It reduces the whole population of the ten states—all persons, of every color, sex, and condition, and every stranger within their limits—to the most abject and degrading slavery."
The political sentiment of the veto message above is most similar to which of the following political positions taken in the twentieth century?
Eng_Single_Step: It is similar to opposition to federal overreach in civil rights debates.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify argument. Step 2: Fear of centralized power. Step 3: Compare eras. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Anti-federal stance.
Portuguese_Single_Step: É semelhante à oposição ao exagero federal nos debates sobre direitos civis.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o argumento. Passo 2: Medo do poder centralizado. Etapa 3: compare as eras. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Postura antifederal.
Spanish_Single_Step: Es similar a la oposición a la extralimitación federal en los debates sobre derechos civiles.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el argumento. Paso 2: Miedo al poder centralizado. Paso 3: Compara épocas. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: postura antifederal.
Italian_Single_Step: È simile all’opposizione all’eccessivo intervento federale nei dibattiti sui diritti civili.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'argomento. Passo 2: Paura del potere centralizzato. Passaggio 3: confrontare le epoche. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: posizione antifederale.
German_Single_Step: Es ähnelt dem Widerstand gegen die Übermacht des Bundes in Bürgerrechtsdebatten.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Argument identifizieren. Schritt 2: Angst vor zentraler Macht. Schritt 3: Epochen vergleichen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Anti-föderale Haltung.
French_Single_Step: C’est similaire à l’opposition à la portée excessive du gouvernement fédéral dans les débats sur les droits civiques.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez l’argument. Étape 2 : Peur du pouvoir centralisé. Étape 3 : Comparez les époques. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : position anti-fédérale.

prompt: A 35-year-old female develops nausea and vomiting after she underwent a cholecystectomy for protracted ileus. Her body mass index was 23 kg/m2 before surgery, and, except for the cholecystitis, she was in good health. The patient remains unable to eat 6 days after surgery. Which of the following forms of nutritional support is most appropriate for this patient?
Eng_Single_Step: Total parenteral nutrition (TPN) is most appropriate.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify inability to eat. Step 2: >5 days duration. Step 3: Provide IV nutrition. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: TPN.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A nutrição parenteral total (NPT) é a mais apropriada.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a incapacidade de comer. Etapa 2: >5 dias de duração. Etapa 3: forneça nutrição intravenosa. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: TPN.
Spanish_Single_Step: La nutrición parenteral total (NPT) es la más apropiada.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la incapacidad para comer. Paso 2: >5 días de duración. Paso 3: Proporcionar nutrición intravenosa. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: NPT.
Italian_Single_Step: La nutrizione parenterale totale (TPN) è la più appropriata.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'incapacità di mangiare. Passaggio 2: durata >5 giorni. Passaggio 3: fornire nutrimento IV. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: TPN.
German_Single_Step: Am besten geeignet ist die totale parenterale Ernährung (TPN).
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie die Unfähigkeit zu essen. Schritt 2: >5 Tage Dauer. Schritt 3: Verabreichen Sie eine intravenöse Ernährung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: TPN.
French_Single_Step: La nutrition parentérale totale (NPT) est la plus appropriée.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez l’incapacité de manger. Étape 2 : durée >5 jours. Étape 3 : Fournir une nutrition IV. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : TPN.

prompt: What is Fascism as an economic system?
Eng_Single_Step: Fascism involves state control with private ownership under strict regulation.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify system. Step 2: Private property. Step 3: Government control. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Controlled capitalism.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O fascismo envolve controle estatal com propriedade privada sob regulamentação estrita.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o sistema. Etapa 2: Propriedade privada. Etapa 3: Controle governamental. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Capitalismo controlado.
Spanish_Single_Step: El fascismo implica control estatal con propiedad privada bajo una regulación estricta.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el sistema. Paso 2: Propiedad privada. Paso 3: Control gubernamental. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: capitalismo controlado.
Italian_Single_Step: Il fascismo implica il controllo statale con la proprietà privata sotto una rigorosa regolamentazione.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il sistema. Fase 2: proprietà privata. Fase 3: controllo governativo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: capitalismo controllato.
German_Single_Step: Faschismus beinhaltet staatliche Kontrolle mit Privateigentum unter strenger Regulierung.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: System identifizieren. Schritt 2: Privateigentum. Schritt 3: Regierungskontrolle. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Kontrollierter Kapitalismus.
French_Single_Step: Le fascisme implique un contrôle étatique avec une propriété privée soumise à une réglementation stricte.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez le système. Étape 2 : Propriété privée. Étape 3 : Contrôle gouvernemental. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : un capitalisme contrôlé.

prompt: Use the sum of the steady-state and homogeneous solutions to find a sequence y [n] such that y [n] - (5/6)y [n - 1] + (1/6)y [n - 2] = 2, y [- 1] = 1, and y [-2] = - 7.
Eng_Single_Step: The sequence is obtained by solving homogeneous and particular solutions.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Solve characteristic equation. Step 2: Find steady-state. Step 3: Apply initial conditions. Step 4: Compute. Final Answer: y[n].
Portuguese_Single_Step: A sequência é obtida resolvendo soluções homogêneas e particulares.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Resolva a equação característica. Etapa 2: Encontre o estado estacionário. Etapa 3: aplique as condições iniciais. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: s[n].
Spanish_Single_Step: La secuencia se obtiene resolviendo soluciones homogéneas y particulares.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: resolver la ecuación característica. Paso 2: encontrar el estado estacionario. Paso 3: Aplicar las condiciones iniciales. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: y[n].
Italian_Single_Step: La sequenza si ottiene risolvendo soluzioni omogenee e particolari.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: risolvere l'equazione caratteristica. Passaggio 2: trovare lo stato stazionario. Passaggio 3: applicare le condizioni iniziali. Passaggio 4: calcolo. Risposta finale: sì[n].
German_Single_Step: Die Folge erhält man durch Lösen homogener und partikularer Lösungen.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Charakteristische Gleichung lösen. Schritt 2: Finden Sie den stationären Zustand. Schritt 3: Anfangsbedingungen anwenden. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: y[n].
French_Single_Step: La séquence est obtenue en résolvant des solutions homogènes et particulières.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Résolvez l’équation caractéristique. Étape 2 : Trouver l’état d’équilibre. Étape 3 : Appliquer les conditions initiales. Étape 4 : Calculer. Réponse finale : o[n].

prompt: An oscillator which emits high frequency waves at 0.26 GHz is set up in front of a large plane metal reflector. Standing waves are formed with nodes 57.5 cm apart. Neglecting the refractive index of air, compute the velocity of light.
Eng_Single_Step: The speed of light is approximately 3×10⁸ m/s.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Node spacing = λ/2. Step 2: Compute λ. Step 3: Use v=fλ. Step 4: Compute. Final Answer: 3×10⁸ m/s.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A velocidade da luz é de aproximadamente 3×10⁸ m/s.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Espaçamento dos nós = λ/2. Etapa 2: Calcule λ. Etapa 3: Use v=fλ. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: 3×10⁸ m/s.
Spanish_Single_Step: La velocidad de la luz es de aproximadamente 3×10⁸ m/s.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Espaciado de nodos = λ/2. Paso 2: Calcule λ. Paso 3: Utilice v=fλ. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: 3×10⁸ m/s.
Italian_Single_Step: La velocità della luce è circa 3×10⁸ m/s.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: spaziatura dei nodi = λ/2. Passaggio 2: calcolare λ. Passaggio 3: utilizzare v=fλ. Passaggio 4: calcolo. Risposta finale: 3×10⁸ m/s.
German_Single_Step: Die Lichtgeschwindigkeit beträgt etwa 3×10⁸ m/s.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Knotenabstand = λ/2. Schritt 2: Berechnen Sie λ. Schritt 3: Verwenden Sie v=fλ. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: 3×10⁸ m/s.
French_Single_Step: La vitesse de la lumière est d'environ 3×10⁸ m/s.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Espacement des nœuds = λ/2. Étape 2 : Calculez λ. Étape 3 : Utilisez v=fλ. Étape 4 : Calculer. Réponse finale : 3×10⁸ m/s.

prompt: Spherical particles of pollen are shakenup in water and allowed to stand. The depth of water is 2 cm. What is the diameter of the largest particles remaining in suspension 1 hr later? Density of pollen =1.8 g/cm^3.
Eng_Single_Step: The largest particles settle quickly; diameter is determined via Stokes’ law.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Use settling velocity. Step 2: Time=1 hr. Step 3: Compute diameter. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Diameter value.
Portuguese_Single_Step: As partículas maiores assentam rapidamente; o diâmetro é determinado pela lei de Stokes.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: use a velocidade de acomodação. Etapa 2: Tempo = 1 hora. Etapa 3: calcular o diâmetro. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Valor do diâmetro.
Spanish_Single_Step: Las partículas más grandes se depositan rápidamente; El diámetro se determina mediante la ley de Stokes.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: utilice la velocidad de sedimentación. Paso 2: Tiempo=1 hora. Paso 3: Calcular el diámetro. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: valor del diámetro.
Italian_Single_Step: Le particelle più grandi si depositano rapidamente; il diametro è determinato tramite la legge di Stokes.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: utilizzare la velocità di assestamento. Passaggio 2: Tempo=1 ora. Passaggio 3: calcolare il diametro. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: valore del diametro.
German_Single_Step: Die größten Partikel setzen sich schnell ab; Der Durchmesser wird über das Stokessche Gesetz bestimmt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Benutzen Sie die Absetzgeschwindigkeit. Schritt 2: Zeit=1 Stunde. Schritt 3: Durchmesser berechnen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Durchmesserwert.
French_Single_Step: Les plus grosses particules se déposent rapidement ; le diamètre est déterminé par la loi de Stokes.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Utilisez la vitesse de stabilisation. Étape 2 : Durée = 1 heure. Étape 3 : Calculer le diamètre. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : valeur du diamètre.

prompt: A defendant was charged with murder. The killing took place on February 1. At the time that the crime occurred, this jurisdiction required a unanimous verdict of all 12 jury members for a conviction on a capital offense. On November 1, the state legislature enacted a new law requiring a majority vote of seven of 12 jurors to convict on a capital offense. The defendant's trial began on December 1. He was subsequently convicted of murder by an eight- to-four vote. Following the trial, the defendant's attorney filed a motion to set aside the verdict. Which of the following would provide the strongest constitutional grounds to overturn the verdict?
Eng_Single_Step: The strongest ground is violation of ex post facto law.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify timeline. Step 2: Law changed after crime. Step 3: Retroactive disadvantage. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Ex post facto.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O fundamento mais forte é a violação da lei ex post facto.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o cronograma. Passo 2: A lei mudou após o crime. Passo 3: Desvantagem retroativa. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Ex post facto.
Spanish_Single_Step: El motivo más fuerte es la violación de la ley ex post facto.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar el cronograma. Paso 2: La ley cambió después del crimen. Paso 3: Desventaja retroactiva. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: ex post facto.
Italian_Single_Step: Il motivo più forte è la violazione della legge ex post facto.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la sequenza temporale. Fase 2: la legge è cambiata dopo il crimine. Fase 3: svantaggio retroattivo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: ex post facto.
German_Single_Step: Der stärkste Grund ist ein nachträglicher Verstoß gegen das Gesetz.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie den Zeitplan. Schritt 2: Das Gesetz wurde nach der Straftat geändert. Schritt 3: Rückwirkende Benachteiligung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Nachträglich.
French_Single_Step: Le motif le plus solide est la violation du droit ex post facto.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez le calendrier. Étape 2 : La loi a changé après un crime. Étape 3 : Désavantage rétroactif. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : ex post facto.

prompt: Let it be required to find the square roots of A where A = 3.08 + j8.455.
Eng_Single_Step: The square roots are computed using complex number polar form.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Convert to polar. Step 2: Take square root. Step 3: Convert back. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Roots.
Portuguese_Single_Step: As raízes quadradas são calculadas usando a forma polar de números complexos.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: converter para polar. Etapa 2: calcule a raiz quadrada. Etapa 3: converta de volta. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Raízes.
Spanish_Single_Step: Las raíces cuadradas se calculan utilizando la forma polar de números complejos.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: convertir a polar. Paso 2: saca la raíz cuadrada. Paso 3: volver a convertir. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: raíces.
Italian_Single_Step: Le radici quadrate vengono calcolate utilizzando la forma polare dei numeri complessi.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: convertire in polare. Passaggio 2: calcola la radice quadrata. Passaggio 3: riconvertire. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: Radici.
German_Single_Step: Die Quadratwurzeln werden mithilfe der Polarform komplexer Zahlen berechnet.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: In Polar umwandeln. Schritt 2: Ziehen Sie die Quadratwurzel. Schritt 3: Zurückkonvertieren. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Wurzeln.
French_Single_Step: Les racines carrées sont calculées sous la forme polaire des nombres complexes.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Convertir en polaire. Étape 2 : Prenez la racine carrée. Étape 3 : Reconvertissez. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : les racines.

prompt: Assume all gases are perfect unless stated otherwise. Unless otherwise stated, thermodynamic data are for 298.15 K. A chemical reaction takes place in a container of cross-sectional area $100 \mathrm{~cm}^2$. As a result of the reaction, a piston is pushed out through $10 \mathrm{~cm}$ against an external pressure of $1.0 \mathrm{~atm}$. Calculate the work done by the system.
Eng_Single_Step: The work done is approximately −101 J.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute ΔV. Step 2: Use w = −PΔV. Step 3: Convert units. Step 4: Compute. Final Answer: −101 J.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O trabalho realizado é de aproximadamente −101 J.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Calcule ΔV. Etapa 2: Use w = −PΔV. Etapa 3: converter unidades. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: −101 J.
Spanish_Single_Step: El trabajo realizado es aproximadamente −101 J.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcular ΔV. Paso 2: Utilice w = −PΔV. Paso 3: convertir unidades. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: −101 J.
Italian_Single_Step: Il lavoro svolto è circa −101 J.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare ΔV. Passaggio 2: utilizzare w = −PΔV. Passaggio 3: convertire le unità. Passaggio 4: calcolo. Risposta finale: −101 J.
German_Single_Step: Die geleistete Arbeit beträgt ungefähr −101 J.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Berechnen Sie ΔV. Schritt 2: Verwenden Sie w = −PΔV. Schritt 3: Einheiten umrechnen. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: −101 J.
French_Single_Step: Le travail effectué est d'environ −101 J.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Calculez ΔV. Étape 2 : utilisez w = −PΔV. Étape 3 : Convertissez les unités. Étape 4 : Calculer. Réponse finale : −101 J.

prompt: A 70-year-old woman comes to the office because of worsening tremor of her hands. The tremor has been present for most of her life and initially was mild and would occur only when she was tired or stressed. During the past month the shaking has become more noticeable and frequent. She is now embarrassed to eat with other people because of how obvious the tremor has become. The patient has been taking fluoxetine for the past 3 weeks to help her to cope with the death of her husband 2 months ago. Medical history is also remarkable for essential hypertension controlled with lisinopril and hyperlipidemia controlled with atorvastatin. Her only other medication is occasional ibuprofen for joint pain. She used to drink one to two alcoholic beverages monthly but now drinks one glass of wine daily because, she says, it reduces her tremor. She is 168 cm (5 ft 6 in) tall and weighs 70 kg (155 lb); BMI is 25 kg/m2 . Vital signs are temperature 36.4°C (97.6°F), pulse 80/min, respirations 18/min, and blood pressure 130/85 mm Hg. Physical examination shows a moderate tremor of both hands that is not present at rest. Complete blood count, serum chemistry profile, and serum thyroid function tests are ordered and results are pending. Which of the following is the most likely cause of the patient's worsening tremor?
Eng_Single_Step: The tremor is most likely essential tremor worsened by stress and medication.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify tremor type. Step 2: Action tremor. Step 3: Medication effect. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Essential tremor.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O tremor é provavelmente um tremor essencial agravado pelo estresse e pela medicação.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o tipo de tremor. Etapa 2: Tremor de ação. Etapa 3: Efeito da medicação. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Tremor essencial.
Spanish_Single_Step: Lo más probable es que el temblor sea un temblor esencial que empeora con el estrés y los medicamentos.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar el tipo de temblor. Paso 2: Temblor de acción. Paso 3: efecto de la medicación. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Temblor esencial.
Italian_Single_Step: Molto probabilmente il tremore è un tremore essenziale peggiorato dallo stress e dai farmaci.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il tipo di tremore. Fase 2: tremore d'azione. Passaggio 3: effetto del farmaco. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: tremore essenziale.
German_Single_Step: Bei dem Tremor handelt es sich höchstwahrscheinlich um einen essentiellen Tremor, der durch Stress und Medikamente verschlimmert wird.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie die Art des Tremors. Schritt 2: Aktionstremor. Schritt 3: Medikamentenwirkung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Essentieller Tremor.
French_Single_Step: Le tremblement est très probablement un tremblement essentiel aggravé par le stress et les médicaments.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez le type de tremblement. Étape 2 : Tremblement d’action. Étape 3 : Effet du médicament. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Tremblement essentiel.

prompt: What is the morphology of the Dane particle?

prompt: A 27-year-old woman comes to the physician because of a 3-year history of chronic diarrhea and intermittent, crampy, lower abdominal pain. The pain is usually relieved with defecation and does not occur at night or interfere with sleep. She says she is frustrated by her symptoms and has stopped traveling because of her frequent, urgent need to use the bathroom. She has no history of serious illness and takes no medications. Her temperature is 37°C (98.6°F), pulse is 70/min, respirations are 14/min, and blood pressure is 120/80 mm Hg. The lower abdomen is mildly tender to palpation; there is no rebound tenderness or guarding. The remainder of the examination shows no abnormalities. Results of laboratory studies are within the reference ranges. Test of the stool for occult blood is negative. Antigliadin antibodies are not present. Which of the following is the most appropriate pharmacotherapy?
Eng_Single_Step: The most appropriate pharmacotherapy is loperamide for IBS-D.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify IBS symptoms. Step 2: Chronic diarrhea, relief after defecation. Step 3: No alarm features. Step 4: Treat symptomatically. Final Answer: Loperamide.

Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar los síntomas del SII. Paso 2: Diarrea crónica, alivio después de la defecación. Paso 3: Sin funciones de alarma. Paso 4: Trate sintomáticamente. Respuesta final: loperamida.

Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare i sintomi dell'IBS. Fase 2: diarrea cronica, sollievo dopo la defecazione. Passaggio 3: nessuna funzione di allarme. Passaggio 4: trattare in modo sintomatico. Risposta finale: loperamide.

prompt: Determine values of the real numbers a, b, and c to make the function $x^2 + ay^2 + y + i(bxy + cx)$ by an analytical function of the complex variable of $x+iy$? Return your answer as a list [a, b, c].

German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Wenden Sie die Cauchy-Riemann-Gleichungen an. Schritt 2: Vergleichen Sie reale/imaginäre Teile. Schritt 3: System lösen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: [1,1,−1].

prompt: A uniformly solid sphere of mass $M$ and radius $R$ is fixed a distance $h$ above a thin infinite sheet of mass density $\rho_5$ (mass/area). With what force does the sphere attract the sheet?
Eng_Single_Step: The force is F = 2πG M ρ₅.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Field of infinite sheet. Step 2: g = 2πGρ. Step 3: Multiply by mass. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: 2πGMρ.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A força é F = 2πG M ρ₅.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Passo 1: Campo da planilha infinita. Etapa 2: g = 2πGρ. Etapa 3: multiplique pela massa. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: 2πGMρ.

Italian_Single_Step: La forza è F = 2πG M ρ₅.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: campo del foglio infinito. Passaggio 2: g = 2πGρ. Passaggio 3: moltiplicare per la massa. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: 2πGMρ.
German_Single_Step: Die Kraft beträgt F = 2πG M ρ₅.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Feld des unendlichen Blattes. Schritt 2: g = 2πGρ. Schritt 3: Mit Masse multiplizieren. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: 2πGMρ.
French_Single_Step: La force est F = 2πG M ρ₅.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Champ de feuille infinie. Étape 2 : g = 2πGρ. Étape 3 : Multipliez par la masse. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : 2πGMρ.

prompt: If an X-linked recessive disorder is in Hardy-Weinberg equilibrium and the incidence in males equals 1 in 100, then the expected incidence of affected homozygous females would be _______.

prompt: N^13 decays by \beta^+ emission. The maximum kinetic energy of the \beta^+ is 1.19MeV. What is thenuclidicmass of N^13?

prompt:
This question refers to the following information.
Our leaders talk about stopping aggression from the north, but this was a struggle among groups of Vietnamese until we intervened. We seem bent upon saving the Vietnamese from Ho Chi Minh even if we have to kill them and demolish their country to do it. As the native people survey bombed-out villages, women and children burned by napalm, rice crops destroyed and cities overrun with our military personnel, they are doubtless saying secretly of the Vietcong guerillas and of the American forces, "A plague on both your houses." … Stop the bombing, north and south, end search and destroy offensive sweeps, and confine our military action to holding operations on the ground. Bombing the north has failed to halt or seriously check the flow of troops to the south and may, in fact, have prompted a much greater war effort by Hanoi.
—Senator George McGovern, "The Lessons of Vietnam," April 25, 1967

French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Définir un tarif spécifique. Étape 2 : Définir l'ad valorem. Étape 3 : Donnez des exemples. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Deux types.

prompt: To what extent and to what effect has the environment been securitized?

prompt: Ralph purchases garden fertilizer at the nearby garden shop rather than drive 50 miles to the neighboring town for the same product. This reflects which type of spatial interaction?
Eng_Single_Step: This reflects the principle of distance decay.

Portuguese_Single_Step: Isso reflete o princípio da redução da distância.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o comportamento. Passo 2: Preferência pela opção mais próxima. Etapa 3: Interação reduzida com a distância. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Decaimento da distância.
Spanish_Single_Step: Esto refleja el principio de disminución de la distancia.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el comportamiento. Paso 2: Preferencia por la opción más cercana. Paso 3: Interacción reducida con la distancia. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Decaimiento de la distancia.
Italian_Single_Step: Ciò riflette il principio del decadimento della distanza.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il comportamento. Passaggio 2: preferenza per l'opzione più vicina. Passaggio 3: interazione ridotta con la distanza. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: decadimento della distanza.
German_Single_Step: Dies spiegelt das Prinzip des Distanzabfalls wider.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Verhalten identifizieren. Schritt 2: Präferenz für nähere Option. Schritt 3: Reduzierte Interaktion mit Distanz. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Entfernungsabfall.
French_Single_Step: Cela reflète le principe de la diminution de la distance.

prompt: Find the energy stored in a nonlinear capacitor with characteristics given by g(t) = 0.5 \nu^2(t) and\nu(t) = 1 + 0.5 sin t from t = 0 to t = 1 sec.
Eng_Single_Step: The energy is obtained by integrating v·i over time.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Use capacitor relation. Step 2: Compute current. Step 3: Integrate power. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Energy stored.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A energia é obtida integrando v·i ao longo do tempo.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Use a relação do capacitor. Etapa 2: calcular a corrente. Etapa 3: Integrar o poder. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Energia armazenada.
Spanish_Single_Step: La energía se obtiene integrando v·i en el tiempo.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: use la relación del capacitor. Paso 2: Calcular la corriente. Paso 3: Integrar el poder. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: energía almacenada.
Italian_Single_Step: L'energia si ottiene integrando v·i nel tempo.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: utilizzare la relazione del condensatore. Passaggio 2: calcolare la corrente. Passaggio 3: integrare la potenza. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: energia immagazzinata.
German_Single_Step: Die Energie erhält man durch Integration von v·i über die Zeit.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Verwenden Sie die Kondensatorbeziehung. Schritt 2: Strom berechnen. Schritt 3: Leistung integrieren. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Energie gespeichert.
French_Single_Step: L'énergie est obtenue en intégrant v·i dans le temps.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Utilisez la relation de condensateur. Étape 2 : Calculer le courant. Étape 3 : Intégrer l’alimentation. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Énergie stockée.

prompt: A man sells novelty items for $1.25 each. His cost is $.75 apiece plus a fixed cost of $140,000. How many items must he sell to break even? What is his sales revenue at that point?
Eng_Single_Step: The break-even point is 280,000 items and revenue is $350,000.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Profit=0. Step 2: Solve (1.25−0.75)x=140000. Step 3: Find x. Step 4: Compute revenue. Final Answer: 280k items, $350k.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O ponto de equilíbrio é de 280.000 itens e a receita é de US$ 350.000.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Lucro = 0. Etapa 2: Resolva (1,25−0,75)x=140000. Etapa 3: Encontre x. Etapa 4: calcular a receita. Resposta final: 280 mil itens, US$ 350 mil.
Spanish_Single_Step: El punto de equilibrio es de 280 000 artículos y los ingresos son de 350 000 dólares.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Beneficio = 0. Paso 2: Resuelva (1,25−0,75)x=140000. Paso 3: Encuentra x. Paso 4: Calcular los ingresos. Respuesta final: 280.000 artículos, 350.000 dólares.
Italian_Single_Step: Il punto di pareggio è di 280.000 articoli e il ricavo è di $ 350.000.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: profitto=0. Passaggio 2: risolvi (1,25−0,75)x=140000. Passaggio 3: trova x. Passaggio 4: calcolare le entrate. Risposta finale: 280.000 articoli, $ 350.000.
German_Single_Step: Die Gewinnschwelle liegt bei 280.000 Artikeln und der Umsatz bei 350.000 US-Dollar.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Gewinn=0. Schritt 2: Lösen Sie (1,25−0,75)x=140000. Schritt 3: Finden Sie x. Schritt 4: Berechnen Sie den Umsatz. Endgültige Antwort: 280.000 Artikel, 350.000 $.
French_Single_Step: Le seuil de rentabilité est de 280 000 articles et les revenus sont de 350 000 $.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Bénéfice=0. Étape 2 : Résolvez (1,25−0,75)x=140000. Étape 3 : Trouvez x. Étape 4 : Calculer les revenus. Réponse finale : 280 000 articles, 350 000 $.

prompt: Suppose X and Y are random variables with μx = 32, σx = 5, μy = 44, and σy = 12. Given that X and Y are independent, what are the mean and standard deviation of the random variable X + Y?
Eng_Single_Step: The mean is 76 and standard deviation is 13.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Add means. Step 2: Variances add. Step 3: Take square root. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: μ=76, σ=13.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A média é 76 e o ​​desvio padrão é 13.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: adicionar meios. Etapa 2: adição de variações. Etapa 3: calcule a raiz quadrada. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: μ=76, σ=13.
Spanish_Single_Step: La media es 76 y la desviación estándar es 13.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: agregar medios. Paso 2: se agregan variaciones. Paso 3: saca la raíz cuadrada. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: μ=76, σ=13.
Italian_Single_Step: La media è 76 e la deviazione standard è 13.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: aggiungere mezzi. Passaggio 2: aggiunta delle varianze. Passaggio 3: calcola la radice quadrata. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: μ=76, σ=13.
German_Single_Step: Der Mittelwert beträgt 76 und die Standardabweichung beträgt 13.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Mittel hinzufügen. Schritt 2: Abweichungen hinzufügen. Schritt 3: Ziehen Sie die Quadratwurzel. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: μ=76, σ=13.
French_Single_Step: La moyenne est de 76 et l'écart type est de 13.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Ajouter des moyens. Étape 2 : ajout des écarts. Étape 3 : Prenez la racine carrée. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : μ=76, σ=13.

prompt: What is the function of the contractile vacuole?
Eng_Single_Step: The contractile vacuole expels excess water to maintain osmotic balance.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify organelle. Step 2: Water regulation. Step 3: Expulsion. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Osmoregulation.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O vacúolo contrátil expele o excesso de água para manter o equilíbrio osmótico.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a organela. Etapa 2: Regulação da água. Etapa 3: Expulsão. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Osmorregulação.
Spanish_Single_Step: La vacuola contráctil expulsa el exceso de agua para mantener el equilibrio osmótico.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el orgánulo. Paso 2: Regulación del agua. Paso 3: Expulsión. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Osmorregulación.
Italian_Single_Step: Il vacuolo contrattile espelle l'acqua in eccesso per mantenere l'equilibrio osmotico.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'organello. Fase 2: Regolazione dell'acqua. Fase 3: espulsione. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: osmoregolazione.
German_Single_Step: Die kontraktile Vakuole stößt überschüssiges Wasser aus, um das osmotische Gleichgewicht aufrechtzuerhalten.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Organelle identifizieren. Schritt 2: Wasserregulierung. Schritt 3: Ausweisung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Osmoregulation.
French_Single_Step: La vacuole contractile expulse l'excès d'eau pour maintenir l'équilibre osmotique.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez l’organite. Étape 2 : Régulation de l'eau. Étape 3 : Expulsion. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : l’osmorégulation.

prompt: In a lap winding dc machine number of conductors are 100 and number of parallel paths are 10. Find the average pitch
Eng_Single_Step: The average pitch is 10.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Pitch = conductors/paths. Step 2: Substitute values. Step 3: Compute. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: 10.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O tom médio é 10.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Passo = condutores/caminhos. Etapa 2: valores substitutos. Etapa 3: calcular. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: 10.
Spanish_Single_Step: El tono promedio es 10.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Paso = conductores/caminos. Paso 2: sustituir valores. Paso 3: Calcular. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: 10.
Italian_Single_Step: L'altezza media è 10.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: altezza = conduttori/percorsi. Passaggio 2: valori sostitutivi. Passaggio 3: calcolo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: 10.
German_Single_Step: Die durchschnittliche Tonhöhe beträgt 10.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Pitch = Leiter/Pfade. Schritt 2: Werte ersetzen. Schritt 3: Berechnen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: 10.
French_Single_Step: Le pitch moyen est de 10.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Pas = conducteurs/chemins. Étape 2 : Remplacez les valeurs. Étape 3 : Calculer. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : 10.

prompt: Two races of corn averaging 48 and 72 inches in height are crossed. The height of the F_1 generation does not vary very much, averaging 60 inches. When 500 of these plants were classified, two were 48 inches, and two were 72 inches, the rest falling between these in height. What is the number of polygenesinvolved, and how many inches does each contribute?
Eng_Single_Step: The number of polygenes is 3 and each contributes 4 inches.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify extremes. Step 2: Use binomial distribution. Step 3: Solve n. Step 4: Compute contribution. Final Answer: 3 genes, 4 inches.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O número de poligenes é 3 e cada um contribui com 4 polegadas.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique os extremos. Etapa 2: use distribuição binomial. Etapa 3: Resolva n. Etapa 4: Calcular a contribuição. Resposta final: 3 genes, 4 polegadas.
Spanish_Single_Step: El número de poligenes es 3 y cada uno aporta 4 pulgadas.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar los extremos. Paso 2: utilice la distribución binomial. Paso 3: Resuelve n. Paso 4: Calcular la contribución. Respuesta final: 3 genes, 4 pulgadas.
Italian_Single_Step: Il numero di poligeni è 3 e ciascuno contribuisce con 4 pollici.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare gli estremi. Passaggio 2: utilizzare la distribuzione binomiale. Passo 3: Risolvi n. Passaggio 4: calcolare il contributo. Risposta finale: 3 geni, 4 pollici.
German_Single_Step: Die Anzahl der Polygene beträgt 3 und jedes trägt 4 Zoll bei.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Extreme identifizieren. Schritt 2: Verwenden Sie die Binomialverteilung. Schritt 3: Lösen Sie n. Schritt 4: Beitrag berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: 3 Gene, 4 Zoll.
French_Single_Step: Le nombre de polygènes est de 3 et chacun contribue à hauteur de 4 pouces.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez les extrêmes. Étape 2 : Utilisez la distribution binomiale. Étape 3 : Résolvez n. Étape 4 : Calculer la contribution. Réponse finale : 3 gènes, 4 pouces.

prompt: Which of the following factors appears to have the strongest influence on learning in people with antisocial personalities
Eng_Single_Step: The strongest influence is inconsistent reinforcement.

Portuguese_Single_Step: A influência mais forte é o reforço inconsistente.

Spanish_Single_Step: La influencia más fuerte es el refuerzo inconsistente.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la personalidad. Paso 2: patrones de aprendizaje. Paso 3: Inconsistencia del refuerzo. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: refuerzo inconsistente.
Italian_Single_Step: L’influenza più forte è il rinforzo incoerente.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la personalità. Fase 2: modelli di apprendimento. Passaggio 3: incoerenza del rinforzo. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: rinforzo incoerente.
German_Single_Step: Der stärkste Einfluss ist die inkonsistente Verstärkung.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Persönlichkeit identifizieren. Schritt 2: Lernmuster. Schritt 3: Inkonsistenz der Verstärkung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Inkonsistente Verstärkung.

prompt: The ethics of conducting archaeological research on sites with human remains of indigenous North American ancestors is addressed by the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act. Problems often arise when:
Eng_Single_Step: Problems arise when scientific research conflicts with indigenous cultural beliefs.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify stakeholders. Step 2: Cultural sensitivity. Step 3: Ethical conflicts. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Cultural conflict.

Spanish_Single_Step: Los problemas surgen cuando la investigación científica entra en conflicto con las creencias culturales indígenas.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar las partes interesadas. Paso 2: Sensibilidad cultural. Paso 3: Conflictos éticos. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: conflicto cultural.
Italian_Single_Step: I problemi sorgono quando la ricerca scientifica entra in conflitto con le credenze culturali indigene.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare le parti interessate. Fase 2: sensibilità culturale. Fase 3: Conflitti etici. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: conflitto culturale.

prompt: For which p is the norm ||x||_p expressable as an inner product?
Eng_Single_Step: The norm is induced by an inner product only for p=2.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify norm types. Step 2: Inner product condition. Step 3: Only Euclidean norm. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: p=2.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A norma é induzida por um produto interno apenas para p=2.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identificar os tipos de normas. Etapa 2: Condição interna do produto. Etapa 3: Somente norma euclidiana. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: p=2.
Spanish_Single_Step: La norma es inducida por un producto interno sólo para p=2.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar los tipos de normas. Paso 2: Estado interno del producto. Paso 3: Sólo norma euclidiana. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: p=2.
Italian_Single_Step: La norma è indotta da un prodotto interno solo per p=2.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare i tipi di norma. Passaggio 2: condizioni interne del prodotto. Passo 3: Solo norma euclidea. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: p=2.
German_Single_Step: Die Norm wird nur für p=2 durch ein inneres Produkt induziert.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Normtypen identifizieren. Schritt 2: Innerer Produktzustand. Schritt 3: Nur euklidische Norm. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: p=2.
French_Single_Step: La norme est induite par un produit scalaire uniquement pour p=2.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifier les types de normes. Étape 2 : État intérieur du produit. Étape 3 : Seule la norme euclidienne. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : p=2.

prompt: For a\geq 0, we define $S_a={x | dist(x, S) \leq a}$, where $dist(x,S)=inf_{y\in S}||x-y||$. Suppose S is convex. Is S_a convex? Return 1 for yes and 0 for no.
Eng_Single_Step: The set Sₐ is convex.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify definition. Step 2: Distance preserves convexity. Step 3: Minkowski sum. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: 1.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O conjunto Sₐ é convexo.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identificar a definição. Etapa 2: a distância preserva a convexidade. Etapa 3: soma de Minkowski. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: 1.
Spanish_Single_Step: El conjunto Sₐ es convexo.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la definición. Paso 2: La distancia preserva la convexidad. Paso 3: suma de Minkowski. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: 1.
Italian_Single_Step: L'insieme Sₐ è convesso.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la definizione. Passaggio 2: la distanza preserva la convessità. Passo 3: Somma di Minkowski. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: 1.
German_Single_Step: Die Menge Sₐ ist konvex.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Definition identifizieren. Schritt 2: Durch den Abstand bleibt die Konvexität erhalten. Schritt 3: Minkowski-Summe. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: 1.
French_Single_Step: L'ensemble Sₐ est convexe.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez la définition. Étape 2 : La distance préserve la convexité. Étape 3 : Somme de Minkowski. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : 1.

prompt: A virus is spreading throughout the population of a town, and the number of people who have the virus doubles every 3 days. If there are 1,000 people in the town, and 10 people have the virus on January 1st, what is the earliest date at which the entire town would be infected with the virus, given that there are 365 days in a year, and 31 days in the month of January?
Eng_Single_Step: The entire town will be infected on January 22.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Doubling every 3 days. Step 2: Solve 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Step 3: n=7 → 21 days. Step 4: Add to Jan 1. Final Answer: Jan 22.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A cidade inteira será infectada no dia 22 de janeiro.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Passo 1: Dobrar a cada 3 dias. Passo 2: Resolva 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Passo 3: n=7 → 21 dias. Etapa 4: adicionar até 1º de janeiro. Resposta final: 22 de janeiro.
Spanish_Single_Step: Toda la ciudad quedará infectada el 22 de enero.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: duplicar cada 3 días. Paso 2: Resuelva 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Paso 3: n=7 → 21 días. Paso 4: Agregar al 1 de enero. Respuesta final: 22 de enero.
Italian_Single_Step: L'intera città sarà infettata il 22 gennaio.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: raddoppiare ogni 3 giorni. Passo 2: Risolvi 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Passo 3: n=7 → 21 giorni. Passaggio 4: aggiungi al 1 gennaio. Risposta finale: 22 gennaio.
German_Single_Step: Am 22. Januar wird die ganze Stadt infiziert sein.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Alle 3 Tage verdoppeln. Schritt 2: Lösen Sie 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Schritt 3: n=7 → 21 Tage. Schritt 4: Zum 1. Januar hinzufügen. Endgültige Antwort: 22. Januar.
French_Single_Step: La ville entière sera infectée le 22 janvier.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Doubler tous les 3 jours. Étape 2 : Résolvez 10·2ⁿ ≥ 1000. Étape 3 : n=7 → 21 jours. Étape 4 : Ajouter au 1er janvier. Réponse finale : 22 janvier.

prompt: If the value of x is between 0.0051 and 0.038, which of the following could be x?
Eng_Single_Step: A valid value could be 0.01.

Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el intervalo. Paso 2: 0,0051 < x < 0,038. Paso 3: elige el valor en el interior. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: 0,01.

prompt: Photochemicalsmogsare thought to be partially initiated by Photochemicalsmogsare thought to be partially initiated by the photolytic decomposition of NO 2 to form NO and O. When the subsequent reaction 2NO + O 2 \rightarrow 2N0_2 is studied kinetically, it is found that when the initial concentration of O_2 is doubled and that of NO held constant, the initial reaction rate doubles; and when the initial concentration of NO is doubled and that of O 2 held constant, the initial reaction rate quadruples. Write the rate expression for this reaction.
Eng_Single_Step: The rate law is Rate = k[NO]²[O₂].
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Doubling O₂ doubles rate → first order. Step 2: Doubling NO quadruples rate → second order. Step 3: Combine. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: k[NO]²[O₂].
Portuguese_Single_Step: A lei da taxa é Taxa = k[NO]²[O₂].
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Duplicar a taxa de duplicação de O₂ → primeira ordem. Etapa 2: Dobrar NÃO quadruplica a taxa → segunda ordem. Etapa 3: combinar. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: k[NO]²[O₂].
Spanish_Single_Step: La ley de velocidad es Tasa = k[NO]²[O₂].
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Duplicar la tasa de O₂ duplica → primer orden. Paso 2: Duplicar NO cuadriplica la tasa → segundo orden. Paso 3: combinar. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: k[NO]²[O₂].
Italian_Single_Step: La legge tariffaria è Tasso = k[NO]²[O₂].
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: raddoppiare O₂ raddoppia il tasso → primo ordine. Passaggio 2: raddoppiare il NO quadruplica il tasso → secondo ordine. Passaggio 3: combina. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: k[NO]²[O₂].
German_Single_Step: Das Geschwindigkeitsgesetz lautet Rate = k[NO]²[O₂].
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Verdoppelung von O₂ verdoppelt die Rate → erste Ordnung. Schritt 2: Verdoppelung von NO vervierfacht die Rate → zweite Ordnung. Schritt 3: Kombinieren. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: k[NO]²[O₂].
French_Single_Step: La loi des taux est Rate = k[NO]²[O₂].
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Doubler O₂ double le taux → première commande. Étape 2 : Doubler le taux NON quadruple → deuxième ordre. Étape 3 : Combinez. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : k[NON]²[O₂].

prompt: In snapdragons, plants homozygous for red have red flowers; those homozygous for white have white flowers, and thosewhich are heterozygous have pink. If a pink flowered snapdragonis crossed with a white flowered plant, what will bethe expected phenotypic results in the progeny?
Eng_Single_Step: The progeny will be 50% pink and 50% white.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Incomplete dominance. Step 2: Pink = heterozygous. Step 3: Cross with white. Step 4: Ratio. Final Answer: 1:1 pink:white.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A progênie será 50% rosa e 50% branca.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: dominância incompleta. Etapa 2: Rosa = heterozigoto. Passo 3: Cruze com branco. Etapa 4: proporção. Resposta Final: 1:1 rosa:branco.
Spanish_Single_Step: La descendencia será 50% rosada y 50% blanca.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Dominio incompleto. Paso 2: Rosa = heterocigoto. Paso 3: Cruzar con blanco. Paso 4: proporción. Respuesta final: 1:1 rosa:blanco.
Italian_Single_Step: La progenie sarà al 50% rosa e al 50% bianca.
Italian_Multi_Step: Fase 1: dominanza incompleta. Passaggio 2: Rosa = eterozigote. Passaggio 3: croce con il bianco. Passaggio 4: rapporto. Risposta finale: 1:1 rosa:bianco.
German_Single_Step: Die Nachkommen werden zu 50 % rosa und zu 50 % weiß sein.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Unvollständige Dominanz. Schritt 2: Rosa = heterozygot. Schritt 3: Mit Weiß überkreuzen. Schritt 4: Verhältnis. Endgültige Antwort: 1:1 rosa:weiß.
French_Single_Step: La progéniture sera à 50% rose et 50% blanche.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Domination incomplète. Étape 2 : Rose = hétérozygote. Étape 3 : Croisez avec du blanc. Étape 4 : Rapport. Réponse finale : 1:1 rose : blanc.

prompt: Physics students are checking the constant acceleration equations of kinematics by measuring the velocity of a tennis ball that is dropped and falls 6 meters and then passes through a photogate. prompt: A partnership purchased five acres of unimproved land for purposes of residential development. prompt: A defendant hated a victim and decided to kill him. The defendant put a loaded gun in his coat pocket and went outside for a walk, not sure if and when he may see the victim. The defendant passed by a bar and decided to go inside for a drink. While in the bar, he drank several bottles of beer and became intoxicated. While walking home from the bar, the defendant bumped into the victim. As soon as the defendant recognized him, he pulled out his gun and shot and killed the victim. In this jurisdiction, first-degree murder is defined as a premeditated and deliberate killing. All other forms of murder are second-degree murder. The defendant is guilty of
Eng_Single_Step: The defendant is guilty of first-degree murder.

prompt: What does the Harrod-Domar model, taken with the Keynesian theory of savings, imply for the growth rates of poor countries?
Eng_Single_Step: It implies low savings trap leading to slow growth in poor countries.

Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique Harrod-Domar. Passo 2: Poupança→investimento. Etapa 3: Baixa economia. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Armadilha do crescimento lento.

prompt: Jones is arrested for driving under the influence of a controlled substance, marijuana. The prosecution wishes to introduce a videotape from a pot party Jones left just before his arrest. The recording shows Jones exhaling a giant cloud of smoke and stating, "that's really great weed, man." Jones testifies on his own behalf, "I'm an honest person. I absolutely did not drive erratically." On cross-examination, the prosecutor asks, "Isn't it true you lied in your divorce trial last year?" If Jones' attorney objects, the court will likely hold the prosecutor's question is
Eng_Single_Step: The question is permissible for impeachment purposes.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify credibility attack. Step 2: Prior dishonesty. Step 3: Allowed cross-exam. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Permissible.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A pergunta é permitida para fins de impeachment.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o ataque à credibilidade. Passo 2: Desonestidade anterior. Etapa 3: interrogatório permitido. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Permissível.
Spanish_Single_Step: La pregunta está permitida a efectos de juicio político.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar el ataque a la credibilidad. Paso 2: Deshonestidad previa. Paso 3: Contrainterrogatorio permitido. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: permisible.
Italian_Single_Step: La domanda è ammissibile ai fini dell'impeachment.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare l'attacco alla credibilità. Passo 2: Pregressa disonestà. Passaggio 3: esame incrociato consentito. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: ammissibile.
German_Single_Step: Die Frage ist für Zwecke der Amtsenthebung zulässig.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Glaubwürdigkeitsangriff identifizieren. Schritt 2: Vorherige Unehrlichkeit. Schritt 3: Kreuzverhör erlaubt. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Zulässig.
French_Single_Step: La question est admissible à des fins de mise en accusation.

prompt:

prompt: Givenf(t) = ^+\infty\int_-\infty h(\sigma)\textphi(t - \sigma)d\sigma determine the power spectral density of f(t) in terms of the power spectral density of \textphi(t) and the Fourier transform of h(t).
Eng_Single_Step: The PSD is |H(f)|² Sφ(f).
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify convolution. Step 2: Fourier transform. Step 3: Multiply spectra. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: |H|²Sφ.

prompt: The reaction of sodium oxide with hydrochloric acid is describedby the following chemical equation, Na_2O(s) +2HCl(g) \rightleftharpoons 2NaCl(s) + H_2O(1) Calculate the heat of reaction @ 298°K using the following data. Data Standard heats of formation NaCl(s)- 98.6 \pm 0.2 kcal/mole Na_2O(s)- 100.7 \pm1.2 kcal/mole HCl(g)- 22.0 \pm 1.0 kcal/mole H_2O(1)- 68.32 \pm0.01 kcal/mole
Eng_Single_Step: The heat of reaction is ΔH = ΣΔHf(products) − ΣΔHf(reactants).
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Sum products. Step 2: Sum reactants. Step 3: Subtract. Step 4: Compute. Final Answer: ΔH.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O calor da reação é ΔH = ΣΔHf(produtos) − ΣΔHf(reagentes).
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: somar os produtos. Etapa 2: Somar os reagentes. Etapa 3: subtrair. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: ΔH.
Spanish_Single_Step: El calor de reacción es ΔH = ΣΔHf(productos) − ΣΔHf(reactivos).
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Sumar productos. Paso 2: Sumar reactivos. Paso 3: Restar. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: ΔH.
Italian_Single_Step: Il calore di reazione è ΔH = ΣΔHf(prodotti) − ΣΔHf(reagenti).
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: somma dei prodotti. Passaggio 2: somma dei reagenti. Passaggio 3: sottrai. Passaggio 4: calcolo. Risposta finale: ΔH.
German_Single_Step: Die Reaktionswärme beträgt ΔH = ΣΔHf(Produkte) − ΣΔHf(Reaktanten).
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Produkte summieren. Schritt 2: Reaktanten summieren. Schritt 3: Subtrahieren. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: ΔH.

French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Additionner les produits. Étape 2 : Additionner les réactifs. Étape 3 : Soustraire. Étape 4 : Calculer. Réponse finale : ΔH.

prompt: 5.4-19. A doorman at a hotel is trying to get three taxicabs for three different couples. The arrival of empty cabs has an exponential distribution with mean 2 minutes. Assuming independence, what is the probability that the doorman will get all three couples taken care of within 6 minutes?
Eng_Single_Step: The probability is (1 − e^{-3/2})³.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Exponential arrivals. Step 2: P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Step 3: λ=1/2. Step 4: Cube for 3 events. Final Answer: Expression.
Portuguese_Single_Step: A probabilidade é (1 − e^{-3/2})³.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: chegadas exponenciais. Etapa 2: P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Etapa 3: λ=1/2. Passo 4: Cubo para 3 eventos. Resposta final: Expressão.

Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Llegadas exponenciales. Paso 2: P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Paso 3: λ=1/2. Paso 4: Cubo para 3 eventos. Respuesta final: expresión.
Italian_Single_Step: La probabilità è (1 − e^{-3/2})³.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: arrivi esponenziali. Passaggio 2: P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Passaggio 3: λ=1/2. Passaggio 4: Cubo per 3 eventi. Risposta finale: espressione.
German_Single_Step: Die Wahrscheinlichkeit beträgt (1 − e^{-3/2})³.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Exponentielle Ankünfte. Schritt 2: P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Schritt 3: λ=1/2. Schritt 4: Würfel für 3 Ereignisse. Endgültige Antwort: Ausdruck.
French_Single_Step: La probabilité est (1 − e^{-3/2})³.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Arrivées exponentielles. Étape 2 : P(≤6)=1−e^{-λt}. Étape 3 : λ=1/2. Étape 4 : Cube pour 3 événements. Réponse finale : Expression.

prompt: Mr. Castle will buy one of two 10-HP motors offered to him. Motor A sells for $169 and has a full-load efficiency of 85.2%. Motor B costs $149 and has a full-load efficiency of 82.1%. The annual inspection and maintenance fee on both motors is 14.5% of the price. If electric energy costs 2.35 cents per kilowatt hour (1 HP = 0.746kw.) find the number of hours per year at which the cost of both motors will be the same.
Eng_Single_Step: The break-even hours are found by equating total costs.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute energy cost. Step 2: Add maintenance. Step 3: Set equal. Step 4: Solve. Final Answer: Hours value.
Portuguese_Single_Step: As horas de equilíbrio são encontradas igualando os custos totais.

Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcular el costo de energía. Paso 2: agregue mantenimiento. Paso 3: igualar. Paso 4: resolver. Respuesta final: valor de las horas.
Italian_Single_Step: Le ore di pareggio si ottengono uguagliando i costi totali.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare il costo energetico. Passaggio 2: aggiungere la manutenzione. Passaggio 3: impostare uguale. Passaggio 4: risolvere. Risposta finale: valore delle ore.
German_Single_Step: Die Break-Even-Stunden werden durch Gleichsetzung der Gesamtkosten ermittelt.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Berechnen Sie die Energiekosten. Schritt 2: Wartung hinzufügen. Schritt 3: Gleich einstellen. Schritt 4: Lösen. Endgültige Antwort: Stundenwert.

prompt: What is one of the differences between simple foragers and complex foragers?
Eng_Single_Step: Simple foragers are nomadic, while complex foragers are more sedentary with resource storage.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify forager types. Step 2: Simple = mobile. Step 3: Complex = settled + storage. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Mobility vs storage.
Portuguese_Single_Step: As forrageadoras simples são nômades, enquanto as forrageadoras complexas são mais sedentárias com armazenamento de recursos.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique os tipos de forrageadoras. Etapa 2: Simples = móvel. Passo 3: Complexo = liquidado + armazenamento. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Mobilidade versus armazenamento.
Spanish_Single_Step: Los recolectores simples son nómadas, mientras que los recolectores complejos son más sedentarios con el almacenamiento de recursos.

Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare i tipi di raccoglitori. Passaggio 2: semplice = mobile. Passaggio 3: Complesso = sistemato + deposito. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: mobilità e storage.
German_Single_Step: Einfache Sammler leben nomadisch, während komplexe Sammler eher sesshaft sind und Ressourcen speichern.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie Häckslertypen. Schritt 2: Einfach = mobil. Schritt 3: Komplex = abgerechnet + Lagerung. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Mobilität vs. Speicher.

French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez les types de butineuses. Étape 2 : Simple = mobile. Étape 3 : Complexe = réglé + stockage. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : mobilité vs stockage.

prompt: Several states have enacted laws shielding reporters from being compelled to release the names of confidential sources. Now, Congress, under intense lobbying pressure from the press, proposes to enact legislation forbidding any state from requiring journalists to reveal the sources of their news articles in civil suits. Which of the following is the strongest constitutional argument in support of this proposed law?
Eng_Single_Step: The strongest argument is that Congress can regulate interstate commerce under the Commerce Clause.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify federal power. Step 2: Media crosses state lines. Step 3: Commerce Clause applies. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Commerce Clause.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O argumento mais forte é que o Congresso pode regular o comércio interestadual sob a Cláusula de Comércio.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique o poder federal. Etapa 2: a mídia cruza as fronteiras estaduais. Etapa 3: Aplica-se a cláusula comercial. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Cláusula Comercial.
Spanish_Single_Step: El argumento más fuerte es que el Congreso puede regular el comercio interestatal bajo la Cláusula de Comercio.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el poder federal. Paso 2: Los medios cruzan las fronteras estatales. Paso 3: Se aplica la Cláusula de Comercio. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Cláusula de Comercio.
Italian_Single_Step: L’argomentazione più forte è che il Congresso può regolamentare il commercio interstatale attraverso la clausola commerciale.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il potere federale. Passo 2: I media attraversano i confini di stato. Passaggio 3: si applica la clausola commerciale. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: clausola commerciale.
German_Single_Step: Das stärkste Argument ist, dass der Kongress den zwischenstaatlichen Handel im Rahmen der Handelsklausel regeln kann.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie die Bundesmacht. Schritt 2: Medien überschreiten Staatsgrenzen. Schritt 3: Es gilt die Handelsklausel. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Handelsklausel.
French_Single_Step: L’argument le plus fort est que le Congrès peut réglementer le commerce interétatique en vertu de la clause commerciale.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez le pouvoir fédéral. Étape 2 : Les médias traversent les frontières étatiques. Étape 3 : La clause commerciale s’applique. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Clause commerciale.

prompt: A wife is the beneficiary of a policy issued by an insurance company, insuring the life of her husband, now deceased. The policy contained a clause providing that double indemnity is payable in the event that death of the insured "results directly, and independently of all other causes, from bodily injury effected solely through external violent and unexpected means. "The husband was found dead in the chicken shed of his farm. His death resulted from wounds caused by a shotgun blast. The wife filed the necessary papers with the insurance company concerning proof of her husband's death. The insurance company admitted liability for the face amount of the policy but rejected the wife's claim for double indemnity. The wife then instituted suit against the insurance company demanding judgment according to the double indemnity provisions of the husband's insurance policy. At trial, the wife was called to testify about the events on the day of her husband's death. The wife said that she was in the kitchen when she heard a gunshot in the shed. As she rushed out of the house, she saw their neighbor running from the shed. The neighbor is present in court. As a witness, the wife was
Eng_Single_Step: The wife’s testimony is admissible as a lay witness observation.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify testimony. Step 2: Personal observation allowed. Step 3: Not hearsay. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Admissible.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O depoimento da esposa é admissível como observação de testemunha leiga.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Passo 1: Identifique o testemunho. Passo 2: Observação pessoal permitida. Etapa 3: não é boato. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Admissível.
Spanish_Single_Step: El testimonio de la esposa es admisible como observación de un testigo no profesional.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar el testimonio. Paso 2: Se permite la observación personal. Paso 3: No rumores. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Admisible.
Italian_Single_Step: La testimonianza della moglie è ammissibile come testimonianza laica.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare la testimonianza. Fase 2: è consentita l'osservazione personale. Passaggio 3: non per sentito dire. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: ammissibile.
German_Single_Step: Die Aussage der Ehefrau ist als Zeugenaussage zulässig.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie die Zeugenaussage. Schritt 2: Persönliche Beobachtung erlaubt. Schritt 3: Nicht vom Hörensagen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Zulässig.
French_Single_Step: Le témoignage de l’épouse est admissible à titre d’observation de témoin profane.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez les témoignages. Étape 2 : Observation personnelle autorisée. Étape 3 : Pas de ouï-dire. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : Admissible.

prompt: Gauthier claims that moral agreements that are equally favorable to all parties are desirable because they:
Eng_Single_Step: They are mutually advantageous and promote cooperation.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify Gauthier view. Step 2: Rational agreement. Step 3: Mutual benefit. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Mutual advantage.
Portuguese_Single_Step: São mutuamente vantajosos e promovem a cooperação.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a visão de Gauthier. Etapa 2: acordo racional. Etapa 3: benefício mútuo. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Vantagem mútua.
Spanish_Single_Step: Son mutuamente ventajosos y promueven la cooperación.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: identificar la vista de Gauthier. Paso 2: Acuerdo racional. Paso 3: beneficio mutuo. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: ventaja mutua.
Italian_Single_Step: Sono reciprocamente vantaggiosi e promuovono la cooperazione.

German_Single_Step: Sie sind für beide Seiten vorteilhaft und fördern die Zusammenarbeit.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie die Gauthier-Ansicht. Schritt 2: Rationale Vereinbarung. Schritt 3: Gegenseitiger Nutzen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Gegenseitiger Vorteil.
French_Single_Step: Ils sont mutuellement avantageux et favorisent la coopération.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Identifiez la vue Gauthier. Étape 2 : Accord rationnel. Étape 3 : Bénéfice mutuel. Étape 4 : Conclure. Réponse finale : avantage mutuel.

prompt: A doctor is concerned about the relationship between blood pressure and irregular heartbeats. Among her patients, she classifies blood pressures as high, normal, or low and heartbeats as regular or irregular and finds that 16\% have high blood pressure; (b) 19\% have low blood pressure; (c) $17 \%$ have an irregular heartbeat; (d) of those with an irregular heartbeat, $35 \%$ have high blood pressure; and (e) of those with normal blood pressure, $11 \%$ have an irregular heartbeat. What percentage of her patients have a regular heartbeat and low blood pressure?
Eng_Single_Step: The percentage is approximately 15.2%.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Compute joint probabilities. Step 2: Use conditional data. Step 3: Find low BP & regular. Step 4: Calculate. Final Answer: ~15.2%.
Portuguese_Single_Step: O percentual é de aproximadamente 15,2%.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Calcular probabilidades conjuntas. Etapa 2: use dados condicionais. Etapa 3: Encontre pressão arterial baixa e regular. Etapa 4: calcular. Resposta final: ~15,2%.
Spanish_Single_Step: El porcentaje es aproximadamente del 15,2%.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Calcular probabilidades conjuntas. Paso 2: utilice datos condicionales. Paso 3: encuentre presión arterial baja y regular. Paso 4: Calcular. Respuesta final: ~15,2%.
Italian_Single_Step: La percentuale è pari a circa il 15,2%.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: calcolare le probabilità congiunte. Passaggio 2: utilizza i dati condizionali. Passaggio 3: trovare la pressione arteriosa bassa e regolare. Passaggio 4: calcolare. Risposta finale: ~15,2%.
German_Single_Step: Der Prozentsatz beträgt ca. 15,2 %.
German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Gemeinsame Wahrscheinlichkeiten berechnen. Schritt 2: Bedingte Daten verwenden. Schritt 3: Finden Sie niedrige und normale Blutdruckwerte. Schritt 4: Berechnen. Endgültige Antwort: ~15,2 %.
French_Single_Step: Le pourcentage est d'environ 15,2 %.
French_Multi_Step: Étape 1 : Calculez les probabilités conjointes. Étape 2 : utilisez des données conditionnelles. Étape 3 : Trouvez une tension artérielle faible et régulière. Étape 4 : Calculez. Réponse finale : ~15,2 %.

prompt: There was a growth in income inequality in the 1980s because:
Eng_Single_Step: It increased due to technological change and policy shifts favoring capital.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify decade. Step 2: Skill-biased tech. Step 3: Tax/policy effects. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Tech + policy.
Portuguese_Single_Step: Aumentou devido às mudanças tecnológicas e às mudanças políticas que favoreceram o capital.
Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique a década. Etapa 2: tecnologia voltada para habilidades. Etapa 3: Efeitos fiscais/políticos. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Política Tech +.

Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la década. Paso 2: tecnología basada en las habilidades. Paso 3: Efectos fiscales/políticos. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: tecnología + política.
Italian_Single_Step: È aumentato a causa del cambiamento tecnologico e dei cambiamenti politici a favore del capitale.
Italian_Multi_Step: Passaggio 1: identificare il decennio. Passaggio 2: tecnologia basata sulle competenze. Fase 3: Effetti fiscali/politici. Passaggio 4: concludere. Risposta finale: tecnologia + politica.

German_Multi_Step: Schritt 1: Identifizieren Sie das Jahrzehnt. Schritt 2: Kompetenzorientierte Technologie. Schritt 3: Steuerliche/politische Auswirkungen. Schritt 4: Abschließen. Endgültige Antwort: Technik + Richtlinie.

prompt: The Mayan king Yax Pahsaj symbolized his royalty on a stele that depicts:
Eng_Single_Step: The stele depicts the king performing rituals affirming divine authority.

prompt: Pay incentives are not always a feasible or effective way of improvingemployee performance or behavior. Discuss the limitingconditions for this program to be effective.

Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identifique os incentivos. Etapa 2: intrínseco versus extrínseco. Etapa 3: Justiça. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta Final: Condições limitantes.
Spanish_Single_Step: La eficacia depende del tipo de tarea, la equidad, la motivación intrínseca y la claridad de la medición.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar incentivos. Paso 2: intrínseco versus extrínseco. Paso 3: Justicia. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: Condiciones limitantes.

German_Single_Step: Die Wirksamkeit hängt von der Art der Aufgabe, der Fairness, der intrinsischen Motivation und der Klarheit der Messung ab.

prompt: Which of the following is true of the assessment of power in the arms?
Eng_Single_Step: Muscle strength is assessed against resistance and graded on a standardized scale.
Eng_Multi_Step: Step 1: Identify assessment. Step 2: Apply resistance. Step 3: Grade strength. Step 4: Conclude. Final Answer: Strength grading.

Portuguese_Multi_Step: Etapa 1: Identificar a avaliação. Etapa 2: aplique resistência. Etapa 3: Resistência da nota. Etapa 4: concluir. Resposta final: Classificação de força.
Spanish_Single_Step: La fuerza muscular se evalúa frente a la resistencia y se clasifica en una escala estandarizada.
Spanish_Multi_Step: Paso 1: Identificar la evaluación. Paso 2: Aplicar resistencia. Paso 3: Grado de resistencia. Paso 4: concluir. Respuesta final: clasificación de fuerza.
Italian_Single_Step: La forza muscolare viene valutata rispetto alla resistenza e classificata su una scala standardizzata.

German_Single_Step: Die Muskelkraft wird im Vergleich zum Widerstand beurteilt und anhand einer standardisierten Skala bewertet.
